# Leonardo Camacho
Essays, strategy writing, and research on organizations, leadership, and compounding advantage.

## Preferred canonical host
https://www.leonardocamacho.com

## Primary crawlable sections
- /en-us
- /en-gb
- /pt-br
- /pt-pt
- /fr-fr
- /welcome
- /pt-br/welcome
- /pt/welcome
- /fr/welcome

## Editorial sections
- /{locale}/writing
- /{locale}/writing/{slug}
- /{locale}/about
- /{locale}/privacy

## Do not use for indexing context
- /studio
- /api/*
- /confirmed
- /pt-br/confirmed
- /pt/confirmed
- /fr/confirmed

## Fresh discovery endpoint
- /sitemap.xml
